Apache Juneau
  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Use
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Help

Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons
Foundational classes and annotations shared across the Juneau Commons libraries.
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.commons.utils
Common internal utilities.
org.apache.juneau.http
HTTP Part Annotations
org.apache.juneau.http.classic
Predefined HTTP headers, parts, entities, resources, and responses built on the classic Apache HttpComponents API.
org.apache.juneau.http.remote
Remote REST API
org.apache.juneau.httppart.bean
HTTP Part Beans
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
HTTP Part Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.microservice
Microservice API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug
REST Debug APIs
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.matcher
Predefined Matchers
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Method exec stats utilities
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.validation
Optional Jakarta Bean Validation 3.x integration for juneau-rest-server — declarative validation of request beans via jakarta.validation.constraints.* annotations.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect used by org.apache.juneau.commons
    Class
    Description
    ClassInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a class.
    ConstructorInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java constructor.
    FieldInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java field.
    MethodInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java method.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect used by org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
    Class
    Description
    Annotatable
    Interface for all annotatable wrapper classes.
    AnnotationInfo
    Encapsulates information about an annotation instance and the element it's declared on.
    AnnotationProvider
    Enhanced annotation provider that returns AnnotationInfo objects and supports runtime annotations.
    BeanRuntimeException
    A RuntimeException wrapper around common reflection exceptions.
    ClassInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a class.
    ClassInfoTyped
    Generic, typed variant of ClassInfo.
    ConstructorInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java constructor.
    ElementInfo
    Abstract base class for all reflection wrapper objects providing common modifier checking functionality.
    ExecutableException
    General exception that occurs when trying to execute a constructor, method, or field using reflection.
    FieldInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java field.
    MethodInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java method.
    TypeVariables
    Encapsulates type variable implementations for a class hierarchy.
    Visibility
    Defines class/field/method visibilities.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect used by org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
    Class
    Description
    AnnotationInfo
    Encapsulates information about an annotation instance and the element it's declared on.
    ClassInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a class.
    ExecutableInfo
    Abstract base class containing common functionality for ConstructorInfo and MethodInfo.
    MethodInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java method.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect used by org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
    Class
    Description
    AccessibleInfo
    Abstract base class for reflection info classes that wrap AccessibleObject.
    Annotatable
    Interface for all annotatable wrapper classes.
    AnnotatableType
    Enum representing the type of reflective object.
    AnnotationInfo
    Encapsulates information about an annotation instance and the element it's declared on.
    AnnotationProvider
    Enhanced annotation provider that returns AnnotationInfo objects and supports runtime annotations.
    AnnotationProvider.Builder
    Builder for creating configured AnnotationProvider instances.
    AnnotationTraversal
    Defines traversal options for annotation searches.
    BeanRuntimeException
    A RuntimeException wrapper around common reflection exceptions.
    ClassArrayFormat
    Defines how array types should be formatted when rendered as strings.
    ClassInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a class.
    ClassInfoTyped
    Generic, typed variant of ClassInfo.
    ClassNameFormat
    Defines how class names should be formatted when rendered as strings.
    ConstructorInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java constructor.
    ElementFlag
    Enumeration of possible modifiers and attributes that can be present on classes, methods, fields, and constructors.
    ElementInfo
    Abstract base class for all reflection wrapper objects providing common modifier checking functionality.
    ExecutableException
    General exception that occurs when trying to execute a constructor, method, or field using reflection.
    ExecutableInfo
    Abstract base class containing common functionality for ConstructorInfo and MethodInfo.
    FieldInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java field.
    MethodInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java method.
    PackageInfo
    Lightweight wrapper around a Package object providing convenient access to package metadata and annotations.
    ParameterInfo
    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a method or constructor parameter.
    Property
    A typed property descriptor that allows you to specify arbitrary consumers and producers corresponding to setters and getters.
    Property.Builder
    Builder for constructing Property instances.
    ReflectionMap
    Maps arbitrary values to classes, methods, fields, and constructors based on name-based patterns.
    ReflectionMap.Builder
    Builder for creating ReflectionMap instances.
    TypeVariables
    Encapsulates type variable implementations for a class hierarchy.
    Visibility
    Defines class/field/method visibilities.

    Class

    A RuntimeException wrapper around common reflection exceptions.

    Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a class.
